logic_delta.intent: Initial implementation: types, ops, cli, main

timeline.description: Baseline: ArchiveState, ops::load/save, ops::compress, cli::resume/add/help, main dispatcher

logic_delta.intent: Layer architecture refactor — Effect-TS dependency graph pattern in C++20

timeline.description: Added layer.h (Layer<Out,In...>, provide), service types (LoggerService, StorageService, CompressService, CliService, ConfigService), five live layers (config, logger, storage, compress, cli), two test stubs (StorageLayerTest, CompressLayerTest). main.cpp rewired to pure layer graph resolution. Dead import (#include <string>) and UB (dangling [&logger] capture) fixed in cli_layer.h. Banned /// @brief comment removed from ops/compress.h.
